title: adenostemma viscosum var. elatum
intro: Adenostemma viscosum var. elatum, also known as the 'viscous seedless adenostemma', is a plant species native to tropical regions, particularly in the Philippines and parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Adenostemma viscosum var. elatum include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
